|         +----------+             |

|       +------++++++---+|         |
|       |               ||         |
|       |               ||         |
| +-----+----+    +-----+----+     |
| |  Node B  |    |  Node C  |     |
| +----------+    +----------+     |
|       ^               ^|         |
|       |               ||         |
|       |               ||         |
|       |               ||         |
|       |               ||         |
|       +-------+-------+|         |
|               |        |         |
|         +-----+----+   |         |
|         |  Node A  |   |         |
|         +----------+   |         |
|                        |         |
|                        |         |
|                        |         |
|[  Left Group  ]--------+         |
|                                  |
+[  Right Group  ]-----------------+
